💳
Digital Finance

Smarter capital, safer transactions

From fraud detection to capital allocation, financial services carry the highest stakes for AI done wrong. We bring the same governance-first discipline used to manage trillions in assets to every agentic finance deployment.

Fraud detection that explains itself

Every flagged transaction comes with a clear, auditable reason — not a black-box score your team has to trust blindly.

Smarter capital allocation

Agentic AI surfaces patterns across portfolios and cash flow in real time, so decisions are made on the full picture, not last month's report.

Built by someone who's managed the risk

Lisa Warren's background includes strategy work across €2.24 trillion in assets under management at Amundi — this isn't theoretical for us.

320%
Year 1 ROI on an AI-driven programme

Our approach to digital finance mirrors the results we've delivered elsewhere: measurable ROI, fully documented, with governance built in so finance and compliance teams can both sign off with confidence.

Want AI your CFO and your risk team both trust?

Start with the Free AI Audit — 2 minutes, an instant personalised report, no obligation.

⚡ Take Free AI Audit Talk to Lisa
